'''鈭歵-z-b-ch''' ('''katazbechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tun|tun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tun|tun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-z-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| katazbechoko
|}
